content:
1. Generates a monthly article report from a database, filtering by optional categories. Exists for a demo but has performance issues.

2. The N+1 query pattern (fetching authors inside a loop) will cause severe slowdowns at scale. Modifications must avoid iterative database calls.

3. Whether to batch-fetch authors and push filtering into SQL. Also uncertain about general code correctness (“haven’t really validated it”).

4. Database errors unhandled; month/year validation missing (e.g., invalid month > 12, invalid categories list); empty categories list filters out all articles; timezone issues with datetime comparisons.
